description: Create the shared multi-page structure: common CSS, shared navigation/footer component pattern, and restructure folder layout. This establishes the foundation all pages will use.
steps: Restructure the frontend/ folder: keep images/, create a new shared style.css that expands the existing one with multi-page support (active nav states per page, page-specific sections). The site will live in the frontend/ folder as the deployment root.

Create a shared CSS file at frontend/style.css that includes ALL existing styles plus new page-specific sections. Add styles for: page headers (inner page hero banners smaller than homepage), content sections with prose styling, timeline/steps components, partner cards, blog card grids, legal page prose, and a consistent footer with site links.

Create frontend/script.js that works across all pages: navbar scroll effect, mobile menu, reveal animations, active nav link highlighting based on current page (not just scroll position), year in footer, and form validation.

Update frontend/index.html as the new homepage. Keep the premium hero (protege tu patrimonio), but update navigation to link to the new pages: Inicio (index.html), Sobre Kepa (sobre-kepa.html), Metales Preciosos (metales-preciosos.html), Como Funciona (como-funciona.html), Partners (partners.html), Blog (blog.html), Contacto (contacto.html). Keep the hero, but add a brief 'how it works' teaser section (3 steps), a trust/about teaser section linking to the full about page, and a CTA section before the footer. Remove the current oro/plata/nosotros/contacto sections since those will now be separate pages.
Ensure the homepage has clear CTAs: 'Solicitar informacion', 'Hablar con Kepa', 'Ver como funciona', 'Contactar por WhatsApp'. The WhatsApp number should be 34611918310.

Add a proper footer to be shared across all pages with: site links organized by category (Descubre: Metales Preciosos, Como Funciona, Blog/Guias; Empresa: Sobre Kepa, Partners/Auvesta, Contacto; Legal: Aviso Legal, Politica de Privacidad), WhatsApp contact link, copyright notice.
Update vercel.json at the project root to set frontend/ as the output directory with proper rewrites/routes for the multi-page structure and cleanUrls.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/index.html loads correctly as a premium homepage with working navigation links to all 7+ pages
CSS variables and design tokens are consistent with the existing premium black/gold palette
Navigation shows 7 main links and highlights the current page
Footer contains organized links to all site pages
All CTAs are present: Solicitar informacion, Hablar con Kepa, Ver como funciona, Contactar por WhatsApp
verification: Open frontend/index.html and verify all navigation links point to correct page filenames
Verify the CSS loads and the black/gold premium design renders correctly
Verify the footer contains links to all pages organized by category
findings: All 8 HTML pages created successfully with shared nav/footer pattern. CSS expanded with page-header, steps, CTA block, prose, FAQ accordion, blog grid, and footer grid components. JS updated for multi-page active nav detection. vercel.json updated with outputDirectory: frontend. All internal links verified to resolve to existing files. WhatsApp number 34611918310 present in all pages.
